summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TrustLayer's three new features: Google Sheets parser, PDF export, and validation history page. All major functionality working correctly.

minor_bugs.issue: Excel file upload returns 400 with 'Excel file format cannot be determined' error when sending CSV content with Excel MIME type
minor_bugs.impact: Excel upload feature not working properly

minor_bugs.issue: Too lenient CSV validation - accepts malformed CSV instead of returning 400 error

ui_bugs.issue: JavaScript error overlay occasionally blocks UI interactions after PDF export

integration_issues.issue: PDF export triggers JavaScript error in console but still works functionally

passed_tests: Google Sheets tab navigation and UI elements
Google Sheets invalid URL error handling
PDF Export button visibility and functionality
History page displays 3 test validations with scores 82, 45, 34
History click to view loads full results dashboard
Back navigation from history to home page
Demo mode works with 16 claim cards and score display
CSV upload dropzone and file handling
Backend API endpoints for validations CRUD operations
PDF export API returns 200 with correct content type
success_percentage: Backend: 83% (10/12 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (19/20 features working)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Excel file upload handling in /api/upload-csv endpoint and resolve JavaScript error overlay that appears after PDF export operations
